<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- chaotic scribbles -->
  <path d="M70 190 C120 80, 220 120, 210 210 S120 290, 140 360 S260 440, 300 360 S340 250, 420 230" fill="none" stroke="#111827" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9"/>
  <path d="M95 420 C140 360, 170 380, 205 340 S260 270, 305 305 S350 380, 410 360" fill="none" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.85"/>

  <!-- tangled lines crossing -->
  <path d="M120 120 C150 140, 180 110, 220 130 S280 200, 320 170 S370 110, 420 140" fill="none" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.8"/>
  <path d="M110 260 C150 220, 210 230, 240 260 S300 330, 350 320 S420 270, 450 300" fill="none" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.8"/>

  <!-- jagged burst -->
  <g fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95">
    <path d="M260 120 L282 150 L318 135 L305 170 L342 178 L312 205 L345 235 L306 238 L320 275 L285 260 L270 300 L258 265 L225 282 L240 244 L205 235 L240 208 L210 176 L248 170 Z" stroke="#111827" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M238 140 L252 160 L274 152 L266 172 L287 176 L268 192 L288 210 L266 212 L273 234 L250 224 L242 245 L234 224 L214 236 L222 214 L202 209 L220 192 L202 173 L225 171 Z" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- scattered chaotic dots -->
  <g opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="78" cy="260" r="4" fill="#111827"/>
    <circle cx="430" cy="170" r="3.5" fill="#111827"/>
    <circle cx="420" cy="410" r="4" fill="#111827"/>
    <circle cx="90" cy="360" r="3" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <circle cx="160" cy="95" r="3" fill="#2563eb"/>
    <circle cx="360" cy="95" r="3" fill="#7c3aed"/>
    <circle cx="260" cy="420" r="3.5" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <circle cx="310" cy="390" r="2.8" fill="#111827"/>
    <circle cx="145" cy="275" r="2.8" fill="#2563eb"/>
    <circle cx="380" cy="260" r="2.8" fill="#ef4444"/>
  </g>

  <!-- motion arcs around center -->
  <g fill="none" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.75">
    <path d="M235 255 C255 195, 325 190, 355 235 C385 280, 360 340, 300 350" />
    <path d="M210 290 C205 230, 255 190, 290 200 C335 213, 345 270, 320 310" stroke="#22c55e" opacity="0.65"/>
    <path d="M250 320 C215 315, 185 280, 195 245 C205 210, 250 195, 275 205" stroke="#06b6d4" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating chaotic concept**

I'm thinking about how to visually represent the concept of "chaotic" without using letters. It sounds like a fun challenge! I want to use chaotic scribbles, tangled lines, and overlapping shapes to really convey that sense of disorder. Maybe incorporating a chaotic swirl with jagged strokes could add to the effect. The final output would just be the SVG, focusing purely on visual elements to capture that chaotic essence. Let’s make it work!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
